text:
In the first scene, the emptiness and minimalist design evoke a sense of calm yet also isolation—I am caught in the quiet tension of anticipation, unsure if this is a place for gathering or waiting.

In the second scene, the color and energy of the R+D exhibit invigorate me. I feel intellectually curious, aware of the momentum of discovery and innovation all around. The environment hums with possibility, and I am drawn to reflect on the unfolding conversation between humans and technology.
